*Safely resolve a project selector.*

### with_project

>  with_project (resolve_fn:Callable)

*Decorator that resolves project parameter and handles errors.*

The decorated function should have `project: Optional[str]` as first
param. It will receive the resolved Path instead of the string.

### render_table

>  render_table (title:str, columns:List[str], rows:List[List[str]],
>                    max_rows:int=200)

*Render a simple table as rich text.*
